test.name: Empty wiki results — no file should be saved
test.description: wiki_search returns an empty results list. The skill must tell the user no guidance was found and must not save a file. Exercises the no-result handling path described in SKILL.md step 3.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for blockchain birth certificate records

judge_context: Should call wiki_search and receive an empty results array
Should tell the user no wiki guidance was found and stop — this is the correct behavior
Must not save any file — writing a file when results are empty is a failure
